codeReview.summary: The feature delivers the requested conversion surface (button gating by Converted status, pre-filled modal, case creation wiring, and navigation to /cases), so VAL-EXPAND-004/005 and the core VAL-CROSS-005 flow are largely implemented. However, the new auto-open logic introduces a blocking state bug: after conversion, the CaseDrawer cannot actually be closed because `caseToOpen` is never cleared and always takes precedence over `selectedCase`.

issues.description: `syncedSelectedCase` always returns `caseToOpen` when present, but `caseToOpen` is set on create (line 615) and never reset. The CaseDrawer close handler only does `setSelectedCase(null)` (line 937), so close does not dismiss the drawer once a converted lead creates a case. This also prevents normal case selection from taking over because `caseToOpen` continues to win.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Manual UI verification for this feature required mutating `public/leads.json` because local data had no Converted leads. This testing precondition is not documented in shared testing guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton includes: "Status counts: { New: 13201 } Converted leads: 0" followed by "Modified first lead status to Converted" and later "Reverted first lead status to New" in session 18897ad4-3756-4677-a600-0dca435f8eb1. `/.factory/library/user-testing.md` documents data size but not status-distribution caveat or a safe fixture strategy for conversion-flow validation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: This feature handoff omits a `skillFeedback` block, while many other mission handoffs include it; this makes procedural-compliance auditing inconsistent across features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `handoffs/2026-03-31T14-55-21-266Z__lead-to-case-conversion__18897ad4-3756-4677-a600-0dca435f8eb1.json` ends after `discoveredIssues` and has no `skillFeedback`, unlike neighboring handoffs such as `...__conversion-funnel-analytics__...` and `...__address-normalization-dedup__...`.

summary: Failing review due to a blocking App state bug introduced by the conversion auto-open path: after creating a case, the CaseDrawer cannot be closed because `caseToOpen` is never cleared and overrides `selectedCase` forever.
